business_question: What are the top 5 products by total revenue in the last 30 days?
business_context: The Head of Merchandising wants to identify best-selling products to optimize inventory and promotional planning.

aggregation_logic.Top Products by Revenue: SUM(order_amount) grouped by product_id, ordered DESC, LIMIT 5

chain_of_thought: Step 1: Filter orders within the last 30 days.
Step 4: Rank and limit to top 5.
sql_answer: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(o.order_amount) AS total_revenue FROM fact_orders o JOIN dim_products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;
